postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /home/vscode/.claude && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y cmake valac libgtk-4-dev libgtk-3-dev libpoppler-glib-dev pkg-config qt6-base-dev qt6-declarative-dev qt6-pdf-dev fonts-noto-color-emoji && opam update && opam install -y lablgtk3 cairo2 && cabal update
